title: Add cross-language OSCORE SCHC vectors
description: Review of project-LICHEN-2auf.42 found test/vectors/schc_compression.json covers rules 0-4 only. Add independent canonical vectors for OSCORE rules 5/6 and update Rust/C consumers together; do not add Python-only vectors that break existing cross-language harnesses.
close_reason: Extended schc_vectors() in test/vectors/generate.py:309 with independent OSCORE rules 5/6; regenerated schc_compression.json:40; updated Rust shared_vectors.rs:4 (comments+coverage 0..7), lib.rs:4 and headers.rs:11; fixed+updated Python test_vectors.py:196, test_headers_rules.py:135, rpl/messages.py:21+290 and visualize.py:21 for 3.9 compat; added+verified C tests in lichen/tests/schc/main.c:177,357,362. Cargo test -p lichen-schc and pytest schc/test_headers_rules.py + vectors interop pass. No frag changes.
